# Peptivex Labs
> Premium research peptides supplier serving Poland and the United Kingdom. HPLC-tested peptides with >98% purity. Fast InPost delivery. Pay by Bank, BLIK and cards.

## Products (19 research peptides)
- [All Products](https://peptivexlabs.com/en/products)
- Retatrutide 20mg & 40mg (triple GLP-1/GIP/Glucagon agonist, pen format)
- BPC-157 5mg & 10mg (regenerative pentadecapeptide)
- TB-500 5mg (Thymosin Beta-4 analog)
- NAD+ 100mg & 500mg (longevity research coenzyme, sirtuin co-substrate)
- GHK-Cu 50mg & 100mg (copper peptide, 4000+ gene modulation)
- MOTS-c 10mg (mitochondrial metabolic peptide)
- SS-31 10mg (Elamipretide, mitochondrial protection)
- CJC-1295 No DAC 5mg (growth hormone releasing)
- Melanotan 2 10mg (melanogenesis)
- 5-Amino-1MQ 10mg (NNMT inhibitor, metabolic)
- Ipamorelin 5mg & 10mg (selective GHRP)
- Selank 5mg & 10mg (anxiolytic neuropeptide)
- SNAP-8 10mg (cosmeceutical, expression line reduction)

## Key Facts
- Purity: >98% HPLC confirmed for all products
- Delivery: Poland 1-2 days (InPost Paczkomaty), UK 2-3 days (InPost Lockers)
- Payments: Pay by Bank (instant bank transfer), BLIK, Visa/Mastercard, Apple Pay, Google Pay (PCI DSS encrypted)
- Languages: Polish, English
- All products for research and laboratory use only
